scope_note: FA body pp 80–126 read at item-mapping depth only in this test run; all clause references below are anchored to Item 17 cross-walk evidence (pp 36–42) plus the Guaranty exhibit (pp 143–144). Full clause-by-clause FA extraction deferred to a non-test run.

renewal_conditions: sign then-current FA which 'may be materially different'

fee_obligations.royalty: 6% monthly Gross Sales due 10th of next month, FA §3
fee_obligations.ad_fund: currently 2%, up to 4.5% of Gross Sales, FA §10

noncurable_defaults: cross-default — any default under any other agreement with franchisor or affiliates
ada_noncurable: insolvency / assignment for benefit of creditors
failure to comply with Development Schedule
unauthorized transfer or termination of any agreement
unauthorized trademark use or IP disclosure
failure 3 times in a year to pay financial obligations
failure 3 times in a calendar year to comply with ADA even if cured

transfer_restrictions.rofr_basis: match any offer received for assets or ownership interest

non_compete_during_term.scope: no diversion of business; no ownership of or services for competing business; no employee interference

non_compete_post_term.radius_basis: 20 miles from any Cupbop Restaurant existing, operating, or under construction at termination
non_compete_post_term.characterization: broader than typical — most franchise systems use the franchisee's own premises radius only; this clause references ANY Cupbop, creating a near-total geographic block in dense Cupbop markets (UT/AZ/ID)

guaranty.guarantor_class: all owners with at least 5% equity
guaranty.scope: full, complete, timely payment AND performance of every term, covenant, condition of FA
guaranty.characterization: Effectively unlimited personal guaranty by all 5%+ owners with full waiver of standard guarantor defenses

liquidated_damages.trigger: termination by franchisor with cause OR franchisee termination without cause
liquidated_damages.formula: sum of accrued royalties for prior 24 full calendar months + applicable taxes
liquidated_damages.fallback_if_remaining_term_short: number of previous months reduced to remaining term months

indemnification.scope: indemnify and hold harmless franchisor and affiliates for unauthorized mark use, law violations, restaurant operation, FA breach

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Non-compete radius 20 miles from ANY Cupbop
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.why_distinctive: Most concepts use franchisee's own premises radius. This clause makes post-term reentry into UT/AZ/ID effectively impossible.

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Cross-default: any default under any other agreement with franchisor or affiliates triggers noncurable default
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.why_distinctive: Combined with the parent-supplier relationship (Cupbop Co. supplies sauces/proteins), a payment dispute with the supplier could become an FA termination event.

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Sales performance kill switch (50% of trailing-12-month national average over 2 years)
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.why_distinctive: Most concepts use absolute revenue targets or quartile thresholds; the moving national-average benchmark means a franchisee can default by underperforming relative to a system-wide rising tide even if their absolute sales are stable.
Open-ended future-burden risk. New royalty rates, new fees, new territory restrictions could all be imposed at renewal.

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Franchisor option to purchase at FMV upon termination/expiration
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.why_distinctive: Combined with right of first refusal on transfers, franchisor controls exit liquidity in both directions.

distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.clause: Confidentiality clauses on franchisees that 'may restrict ability to speak openly'
distinctive_or_unusual_clauses.why_distinctive: Disclosed in Item 20; reduces value of franchisee references in due diligence.
